# Copilot Instructions

- Follow the repository-wide rules in `AGENTS.md`.
- For published narrative documentation under `docs/**`, use the editorial rules in `docs/AGENTS.md`.
- Apply the same `docs/AGENTS.md` editorial standard to homepage content in `src/pages/index.js` and `src/components/HomepageFeatures/**`.
- For OpenAPI specification, template, and generated API-reference work under `openapi/**`, follow `openapi/AGENTS.md`.
- For code review and repository-wide changes, follow the review-routing and code-review instructions in `AGENTS.md`.
